# MemEye Benchmark — unified requirements for all baseline methods
# Install: conda activate memorybench && pip install -r requirements.txt

# Core benchmark
numpy
pyyaml
tqdm
python-dotenv

# LLM API clients
openai>=1.0.0
anthropic
tiktoken
google-genai
litellm

# Embeddings & retrieval
sentence-transformers>=2.2.0
torch>=2.0.0
transformers>=4.30.0
rank-bm25>=0.2.2
faiss-cpu>=1.7.0
scikit-learn

# Image processing
Pillow>=9.0.0
scikit-image
PyMuPDF

# NLP evaluation
nltk>=3.8.0
rouge-score
bert-score

# Data handling
pandas
pydantic>=2.0.0
pydantic-settings
sqlalchemy
jinja2
json_repair

# Method-specific (A-MEM, MIRIX, SimpleMem, etc.)
pytz
demjson3
pathvalidate
docstring_parser
humps
colorama
httpx_sse
rapidfuzz
psutil
Markdown
openpyxl
SpeechRecognition
pydub
python-multipart
pg8000
langchain>=0.2.0
langchain_core
langchain-openai
llama_index
pymongo
llama-index-embeddings-google-genai
opentelemetry-api
opentelemetry-sdk
fastapi>=0.100.0
uvicorn>=0.20.0

# NOT included (install manually if needed):
# PyQt6, pyautogui — GUI, not needed for benchmark
# ffmpeg — system package
# pgvector — requires PostgreSQL
